data_needed: Meesho Ads — per-SKU spend and ROAS
reason: Currently only total monthly ad spend is extracted. Without per-SKU ad data, it is impossible to determine which products are ad-profitable or flag campaigns bleeding spend on low-conversion SKUs.

data_needed: Flipkart Ads — per-campaign ROAS (FSN, placements, search)
reason: 7 ad report types are downloaded but only total spend survives processing. Campaign-level data is available in the raw files and is currently discarded. Running ads daily without per-campaign performance data means no way to optimize spend.

data_needed: Flipkart Returns — reason codes (quality, wrong item, size)
reason: Meesho return reasons are extracted and used. Flipkart returns only provide a count. Cross-platform return pattern analysis requires reason codes from both platforms.

FK Payments covers settlement. FK Orders gives daily unit counts and order-level detail which are different. Daily order velocity is needed to detect sudden drops and correlate with external events (e.g. ad pauses, competitor activity).
fulfilled_note: process_fk_orders() handler built. Tables: fk_orders_daily (date, orders, quantity) and fk_orders_sku (date, sku, orders, quantity) in rumee_db_fk_orders.csv.

reason: Daily views data exists in the me_views DB table but the insights engine has no trend module for it. Views trend over time shows impact of listing changes, pricing actions, and seasonal shifts. Data is ready — analysis logic needs to be built.
